fields.Title: 01 Matrix
fields.Pattern: Multi-source BFS from all zero cells to fill nearest-zero distances.
fields.Invariant: When a cell first receives a distance, that distance is minimal because BFS expands in increasing distance order from all zero sources.
fields.Code:
dist0 = 0 at every zero and -1 elsewhere
q0 = all zero cells
for each popped cell, assign unseen neighbors distance + 1
fields.Pitfall(s): Start from all zeros. Starting BFS separately from each one-cell is much slower and obscures the invariant.
